events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, critical-risk sequence violation. Venting trapped pressure to face level indicates the manifold vent path was not directed away from personnel and/or zero-energy verification was skipped before bleeding — a direct violation of standard mfr manifold isolation/vent procedure. Work must stop, the manifold re-isolated, vent tubing redirected away from the technician, and PPE/zero-energy checks confirmed before continuing.
